creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bug 227394 updates the www/moinmoin port to integrate a new v2 version of the reCaptcha plugin, and the email verification patch currently applied by clusteradm  in a custom version of the port.

The post-update procedure requires a new set of reCaptcha v2 API keys to be generated, and either installed in the wiki environment by clusteradm, or provided securely to wiki-admin so that they may be installed.
